title: Policy Replay Fixture
description: Test fixture for agt policy replay. Each fixture records a policy decision and its expected outcome.

expected_verdict.description: Expected policy verdict. 'audit' and 'block' are reserved for future use; current fixtures use 'allow' and 'deny'.

resolution_metadata.description: Optional: resolution details for conflict-resolution strategies.

rule_id.description: The winning rule ID after conflict resolution.

strategy.description: Informational: the conflict resolution strategy that produced the verdict. Not used for pass/fail determination; recorded for audit and debugging only.

recorded_at.description: When this fixture was originally recorded.
